x-kubernetes-validations.message: JobStatus and JobDeploymentStatus cannot be used together within the same deletion condition.
the deletion condition requires either the JobStatus or the JobDeploymentStatus field.
legacy policies (onSuccess/onFailure) and deletionRules cannot be used together within the same deletionStrategy
deletionStrategy requires either BOTH onSuccess and onFailure, OR the deletionRules field (cannot be empty)
the managedBy field value must be either 'ray.io/kuberay-operator' or 'kueue.x-k8s.io/multikueue'
the managedBy field value must be either 'ray.io/kuberay-operator' or 'kueue.x-k8s.io/multikueue'
